vix.regime_desc: VIX normal at 18.7 (+1.2 this week). SPY +7.3% vs 200 SMA.

day_trade.title: 🥇 Day Trade — Breakout
day_trade.description: Intraday momentum plays with volume confirmation. Get in, ride the move, get out.

swing.title: 🥈 Swing Trade — Momentum Pullback
swing.description: 3-10 day holds. Trend is up, stock pulled back to support. Bounce 2.0 setups.

csp.title: 🥉 Cash-Secured Put — Wheel
csp.description: Premium selling with an edge. Strong stocks you'd own anyway, sell puts at support.

methodology.classification: Day trade = volume surge + RSI momentum. Swing = pullback to EMA + stoch oversold.
methodology.csp: TradingView screener → EMA/ATR filter → options chain → VoPR enrichment
